info.title: api.harsh.dev
info.description: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience in Java backend development, AWS cloud solutions, and CI/CD DevOps.

profile.name: Harsh Raj
profile.role: Senior Software Engineer — Architecting Scalable Backend Systems
profile.bio: 6+ years of experience engineering high-availability, scalable backend systems. Expert in microservices architecture (Java/Spring Boot, NodeJs) and AWS cloud infrastructure, optimizing P99 latency to sub-100ms. Led major system refactors including Java 8→17 migrations and developed robust Kafka-based async event pipelines for high-throughput EdTech and FinTech platforms.

highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend microservices using Java/J2EE and Spring Boot, ensuring high availability and fault tolerance.
Led migration from legacy Java 8 to 17.
Designed and optimized database schemas in Oracle SQL for transactional integrity and utilized DynamoDB for high-throughput NoSQL data storage.
Contributed to the design of an application consolidating text/doc files into a single PDF for enhanced data management.
Designed RESTful APIs adhering to industry standards, handling JSON payloads for seamless communication between frontend and backend services.
Led Elastic Beanstalk to Elastic Container Services migration, improving scalability and resource efficiency.
Optimized cloud costs and improved application speed by transitioning multiple front-end Angular applications to S3-based hosting.
Implemented Sonar integrations in the CI/CD pipeline, ensuring consistent gold standard code quality across 15 services.
Worked on SPA React application, utilized context and redux as a state managing tool in writing components.

projects.name: AWS Drift Detector
projects.description: Automated serverless system with a RAG-powered Gen AI component to detect, interpret, and report infrastructure drift across AWS environments, ensuring configuration consistency.

projects.name: DeltaDevX
projects.description: A developer-focused tool built with Tauri and React offering various utilities such as SQL formatting, JSON diffing, and tokenization.

projects.name: PDF Consolidation Service
projects.description: Designed and built an application that consolidates multiple text/doc files into a single PDF for enhanced data management and reporting.

projects.name: ECS Migration Platform
projects.description: Led migration from Elastic Beanstalk to Elastic Container Services, improving scalability, resource efficiency, and deployment reliability.

projects.name: Sonar CI/CD Integration
projects.description: Implemented SonarQube integrations in the CI/CD pipeline, ensuring consistent gold-standard code quality across 15 microservices.

projects.name: S3 Hosting Optimization
projects.description: Optimized cloud costs and improved application speed by transitioning multiple frontend Angular applications to S3-based static hosting.

certifications: Oracle Certified Associate, Java SE 8 Programmer
ticker: Led Java migration across critical microservices
Kafka-based async event pipeline cuts inter-service latency by 40%
Achieved SOX and SOC 2 compliance for McGrawHill EdTech platform
Led ECS migration improving deployment reliability by 60%
Implemented SonarQube quality gates across 15 production services
